LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ADRIAN CABANSAGAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT ATTACHED A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY C C P 473 (B) ON WHICH HIS MOTION IS BASED. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment;
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT ADRIAN CABANSAGAN'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT ATTACHED A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY C C P 473 (B) ON WHICH HIS MOTION IS BASED. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
